it's definitely an issue... parks could be so much better if they just had more funds for upkeep
society paints unrealistic 'success' timelines anyhow
always chuckle when friends talk about long-term plans — feel like i'm just learning to manage my finances right! adulting goes brrr...
even experts cross fingers behind charts
once saw someone try writing off their pet's birthday party as business entertainment... wonder if they gave any useful advice lol
not sure i buy that 'leave work at work' thing - my work thinking seeps into everything i do; even when talking budgets at home feels like negotiating a contract!
lawyer here - can't look at any document now without spotting loopholes... even restaurant menus aren't safe! 🤦‍♀️
even law isn't immune - clients often looking for 'senior partner' vibes despite expertise
honestly, feels like whatever you do gets twisted because you don't fit their 'norm'. pretty frustrating when trying your best gets labeled extra instead of competent - reality for many out here.
